2606.23654.title: EnterpriseClawBench: Benchmarking Agents from Real Workplace Sessions
2606.23654.paper_summary: Enterprise agents increasingly operate inside workspaces: they read heterogeneous files, invoke tools, and deliver business artifacts. We introduce EnterpriseClawBench, an enterprise agent benchmark constructed from proprietary, real-world agent sessions. Starting from a large archive of workplace sessions, the EnterpriseClawBench produces 852 reproducible tasks, each paired with recovered fixtures, rewritten prompts, role classes, skill subclasses, hard rules, and semantic rubrics. Because the sessions contain internal enterprise content, we do not release the benchmark data; instead, our reusable contribution is the construction and evaluation protocol. On EnterpriseClawBench, the best configuration reaches only 0.663 (Codex with GPT-5.5). These results show that enterprise agent evaluation must report harness--model combinations, artifact delivery, visual quality, cost, runtime, and skill-transfer behavior, rather than collapsing performance into a single score. Code: https://github.com/FrontisAI/EnterpriseClawBench
2606.23654.paper_summary_zh: 企業代理人越來越多地在工作空間內運作：他們閱讀異構文件、調用工具並交付商業工件。 我們介紹了EnterpriseClawBench，這是一個由專有的現實世界代理會話構建的企業代理基準。 從大量的工作場所會話檔案開始，EnterpriseClawBench產生了852個可重現的任務，每個任務都配有恢復的固定裝置、重寫的提示、角色類別、技能子類別、硬性規則和語義標準。 由於這些會話包含內部企業內容，我們不會發布基準數據；相反，我們可重用的貢獻是建設和評估協議。 在EnterpriseClawBench上，最佳配置僅達到0.663（Codex與GPT-5.5）。 這些結果表明，企業代理評估必須報告裝置--模型組合、工件交付、視覺質量、成本、運行時間和技能轉移行為，而不是將性能簡化為單一分數。 代碼：https://github.com/FrontisAI/EnterpriseClawBench
2606.23654.author: Jincheng Zhong et.al.
2606.23654.authors: Jincheng Zhong, Weizhi Wang, Che Jiang, Kai Tian, Zhenzhao Yuan, Junlin Yang, Dianqiao Lei, Kaiyan Zhang
